news.title: Van Barosu Rojin Kabaiş dosyasından neden çekildi, taraflar ne diyor?

news.title: İran ve ABD heyetleri kalıcı bir anlaşma için Katar'da
news.summary: İran ve ABD heyetleri, kalıcı bir barış anlaşması için 30 Haziran'da Katar'da başladığı müzakerelere devam ediyor.

news.title: İsrail Lübnan, Suriye ve Gazze'deki 'güvenlik bölgeleri'nde kalacağını açıkladı

news.title: Somali Savunma Bakanlığı: 'Türk F-16'ları Eş Şebab militanlarını vurdu'

news.title: MEB, MESEM verilerini paylaştı: '3 bin 80 iş kazasının 13'ü ölümle sonuçlandı'
news.summary: Millî Eğitim Bakanlığı, MESEM Programı kapsamında 3 bin 80 iş kazası yaşandığını, bunların 13'ünün ölümle sonuçlandığını açıkladı.

news.title: İBB davasında 60'ıncı duruşma. Murat Ongun savunmasını tamamladı
news.summary: İBB'de yolsuzluk iddiasıyla açılan davanın 60'ıncı gününde tutuklu sanıklardan Murat Ongun savunmasına devam etti. Ongun, firari sanık Emrah Bağdatlı ile 25 yıllık arkadaş olduğunu ve aralarında bugüne kadar herhangi bir para transferi bulu

news.title: 15 Temmuz'da anma etkinlikleri. Yurt içi ve yurt dışında binlerce etkinlik düzenlenecek
news.summary: 15 Temmuz Demokrasi ve Millî Birlik Günü’nün 10. yıl dönümü kapsamında, yurt içinde ve yurt dışında binlerce etkinlik düzenlenecek. İletişim Başkanı Burhanettin Duran, gazetecilere 15 Temmuz programını anlattı.

news.title: Cumhurbaşkanı Erdoğan Türkiye Katolik Episkoposlar heyetini kabul etti
news.summary: Cumhurbaşkanı Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, Türkiye Katolik Episkoposlar heyetini kabul etti.

news.title: NATO Zirvesi öncesi Ankara’da önlemler en üst seviyede. "900'e yakın şok uygulama yapıldı"
news.summary: Ankara İl Emniyet Müdür Yardımcısı Arif Hakan Tandoğan, 56 bin personelin görev yapacağı NATO Zirvesi öncesinde şehir genelinde 900'e yakın şok uygulama gerçekleştirildiğini açıkladı.

news.title: İstanbullular dikkat! Üç saat boyunca kapalı kalacak

news.title: Haziran ayı enflasyonu ne zaman açıklanacak?
news.summary: Ekonominin nabzını yakından takip eden milyonlarca vatandaşın gözü, her ay olduğu gibi bu ay da kritik bir veriye çevrildi. Piyasalardan kiralara, maaş hesaplamalarından günlük harcamalara kadar geniş bir alanı doğrudan etkileyen bu önemli

news.title: 'Time for him to pay' - Carroll calls on Trump to pay $5m after president's appeal fails
news.summary: The writer's lawyers say Trump wants to delay paying the damages awarded by a jury that found the president liable for sexually abusing and defaming her.

news.title: Controversial bishops ordained as Pope warns of 'schism' in Catholic Church
news.summary: Thousands of worshippers attended a ceremony in the Swiss Alps as part of the breakaway Society of Saint Pius X.

news.title: Three die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations
news.summary: More than one million people took to the streets of Mexico City on Tuesday to mark the country's win over Ecuador.

news.title: Fire kills five at Antwerp apartment block
news.summary: A man was seen clambering through a window to escape black smoke in the block where some 200 people live.

news.title: Man guilty of attempted murder of three children in Dublin
news.summary: Riad Bouchaker denied attempting to murder three children and assaulting four other people on 23 November 2023.

news.title: Syria's president names final 70 lawmakers to new post-Assad parliament
news.summary: Fifteen women are appointed, after only six female candidates were selected by regional electoral colleges last October.

news.title: The Iran talks expose the collapse of US diplomacy
news.summary: In the Trump era, American diplomacy is being led not by impartial diplomats, but by real estate investors.

news.title: Warmest June on record for England, second-warmest for UK, says Met Office
news.summary: A punishing heatwave affected many parts of the country during the last week of the month.

news.title: Amnesty says RSF committed ethnic cleansing in Sudan’s el-Fasher
news.summary: Rights group accuses the paramilitary of 'crimes against humanity' for attacks in and around North Darfur State capital.

news.title: What is a heat dome? The US heatwave explained
news.summary: The heatwave will likely see record high temperatures, ahead of Fourth of July celebrations and FIFA matches in the US.

news.title: Secretive Gaza meetings in Cyprus as plan to isolate Hamas gathers pace
news.summary: Board of Peace talks on Gaza's post-war future face funding crises and warnings of a colonial occupation.

news.title: Trump takes first flight on new Qatar-gifted Air Force One
news.summary: US President Donald Trump took his maiden voyage aboard the new Air Force One on Wednesday.

news.title: Americans are showing up for the World Cup in record-breaking numbers
news.summary: While the U.S. isn't a bona fide soccer nation yet, the past three weeks have perhaps shown what it would feel like if it were.

news.title: Funerals held for 14 Pakistani children killed in tutoring center collapse
news.summary: Police are investigating whether negligence during construction work caused the collapse in the eastern city of Lahore on Tuesday.

news.title: SCOTUS upholds birthright citizenship. And, key results from Colorado's primaries
news.summary: The Supreme Court upheld birthright citizenship on constitutional grounds on the last day of its term. And, a Democratic socialist has won the Democratic primary for a U.S. House seat in Denver.

news.title: Greetings from London, where Banksy's flag man is a warning cry
news.summary: As he marches on, his flag blows back into his face, leaving him unaware he is only a step away from a perilous fall. As usual with Banksy's art, the statue presents a sharp critique of society.

news.title: A federal law bans late voter roll purges. Republicans are pushing to reinterpret it
news.summary: There's a ban on most states systematically purging voter rolls within 90 days before Election Day. Republicans are pushing courts to reinterpret that longstanding protection for eligible voters.

news.title: Kids with autism are prone to drowning. Florida is trying to prevent that
news.summary: Kids with autism can be 160 times more likely than other children to drown. Florida is dedicating state money to a program that prioritizes swim lessons for these kids.

news.title: Sudan’s RSF committed crimes against humanity in El Fasher, Amnesty says

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
